description: A perfect stiletto that enhances your feminine touche, this shoe from catwalk blends perfectly with both western and ethnic wear. Heel: 3" Upper Nubuck rims stitched onto the synthetic leather bottom in a glossy style Slip-on style for ease of wear Padded synthetic leather footbed Outsole TPR outsole grooved on the curved forefoot and heel patch for grip Shoe care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
